sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Racing game with scanline-based road rendering for 3D effect.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Acceleration
special_mechanics.description: Car accelerates from 0 to 100 km/h normal speed, turbo mode increases to maximum 255 km/h

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Braking & Deceleration
special_mechanics.description: Vehicle coasts and decelerates to 0 km/h when time runs out, giving 5-10 extra seconds to reach checkpoint

special_mechanics.name: Collision & Crash Physics
special_mechanics.description: Hitting obstacles or other cars causes vehicle to flip and crash

special_mechanics.name: Stereoscopic 3D Mode
special_mechanics.description: Scanline-based road rendering to create 3D depth effect on CRT televisions

tier_notes: Tier 3 (empirical/qualitative) - Racing game with no documented sub-pixel system or character physics parameters. Only vehicle speed values documented (100 km/h normal, 255 km/h turbo). Game focuses on driving mechanics, not platformer physics.
